prompt: FIXED SUBJECT. The attached image is a locked foreground layer. Mask and lock every pixel of the woman and her entire dress: her face, expression, skin, hair, arms; the cream ditsy-floral cotton dress with white lace-trimmed flutter sleeves and neckline, shirred waist and full midi skirt; her shoes, bracelet and jewelry. Reproduce all of that EXACTLY and identically — do not redraw, recolor, restyle, re-pattern, resize or move it, and do not 'clean up' the floral print. Inpaint ONLY the background outside the locked subject. Preserve the original framing; do not crop. Match the new background's light direction and warmth to the light already on her so it composites naturally. Scene: Provencal cafe terrace — ochre-washed wall with an open cafe doorway, vintage cane bistro chairs at small tables, terracotta pots spilling pink geraniums and bougainvillea, dappled light through a plane tree over a cobbled square. Soft, slightly warm light.
